final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 character 赵灵儿 IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout (3 rows × 3 columns, 9 panels total), each panel framed as a character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman (long flowing light-colored hair, delicate ethereal features, 仙侠 character identity) — one per panel:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel backdrop is a torn white paper hole revealing the character behind it
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, lively, playful atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction matching each outfit color per panel — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D render surface treatment — exact sheen and texture detail is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 9 distinct panels in a 3×3 grid; each panel must show a different expression and outfit as listed; character must maintain consistent 赵灵儿-inspired identity across all panels
Avoid:
